name: rolepod
description: Coordinated dev-team workflow — 18 specialist agents, pre-commit gates, lifecycle orchestration. Universal AI coding workflow for Claude / Codex / Gemini.

plugins.name: rolepod
plugins.description: Turn Claude Code into a coordinated software-house team. 18 specialist agents (backend, frontend, QA, security, billing, performance, design, docs, ops) work in parallel by domain ownership. Pre-commit gates (S1-S5 simplicity / T1-T6 testing / F1-F5 failure-mode) catch bugs before ship. /team-* slash commands orchestrate the 6-phase lifecycle (Define → Plan → Build → Verify → Review → Ship). 42 skills, 7 rules, 5 hooks. Works in any repo.
